violations.text: Serving Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils between uses must be stored in one of the following manners: on a dry clean surface, in water that is maintained at a temperature of 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above, or in water with adequate flow to flush away particulates or other sources of contamination. Utensils were cleaned and sanitized during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets of the 2-door low boy were observed in poor repair. Refrigerator door gaskets are to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment must be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
The floor tiles in the dry storage area are missing and are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

The establishment is lacking a written allergen statement for consumer view. Establishment is to display a written allergen statement at the point of ordering or on the menu board for consumer notification. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024

Coffee stirring spoons were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils between uses must stored in one of the following manners; on a dry clean surface, in water that is maintained at a temperature of 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above, or in water with adequate flow to flush away particulates or other sources of contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024

The bottom surface of the 2-door sliding glass refrigerator located in the cooking area was not in good repair. The bottom surface of the refrigerator must be either painted with approved food grade paint or covered over with stainless steel to make a smooth, clean, durable, and easily cleanable surface. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets of the 2-door low boy were observed in poor repair. Refrigerator door gaskets are to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the fan guards in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment must be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024
